# Senior Product Engineer

Company: ExampleWorks
Location: Toronto hub preferred; remote considered for exceptional candidates
Compensation: CAD 150,000 to 185,000 base plus equity

ExampleWorks builds workflow tools for regulated financial teams. The role is
hybrid for people near Toronto and remote-friendly for candidates elsewhere in
Canada who can overlap 10:00-15:00 ET.

## Requirements

- 6+ years building production web applications with TypeScript and React.
- Strong backend experience with Node.js, PostgreSQL, queues, and API design.
- Evidence of improving reliability, accessibility, or performance with
  measurable outcomes.
- Comfortable writing clear customer-facing release notes and technical design
  docs.

## Nice to Have

- Experience with GraphQL, SOC 2 controls, audit logging, or fintech workflows.
- French language ability.
